channel.title: Siyuan
channel.description: Technical notes from products I am actually shipping.

item.title: Building bili-webos for the living room
item.description: Notes on building an open-source Bilibili client for LG webOS TVs.

item.title: A Claude Code skill for LG webOS app work
item.description: Why a repeatable webOS development workflow belongs in a small skill.

item.title: wechat-cli: boring automation is the point
item.description: Notes on a single-file Python tool for WeChat automation through WebDriverAgent.
